description.en: Smashed cucumber tossed in garlic and chili oil.
description.zh: 拍黃瓜，蒜泥紅油涼拌。

description.en: Blanched spinach dressed with aged vinegar and chili.
description.zh: 菠菜汆水，老醋涼拌，微辣爽口。

description.en: Poached chicken shreds tossed in a spicy sesame dressing.
description.zh: 雞絲涼拌，麻辣芝麻醬汁。

description.en: Chilled beef shank and dried lettuce in chili oil.
description.zh: 牛展薄切，貢菜辣油涼拌。

description.en: Pan-blistered green peppers seasoned with soy and vinegar.
description.zh: 青椒乾煸至虎皮，醬醋調味。

description.en: Seasonal greens blanched and dressed with garlic sauce.
description.zh: 時令蔬菜汆熟，蒜汁涼拌。

description.en: Beef ribs braised with tomato, carrot and radish in a rich soy sauce.
description.zh: 牛肋條配番茄、蘿蔔醬燒入味。

description.en: Spare ribs braised with potato, taro and fresh bamboo shoots.
description.zh: 排骨配土豆、芋頭、鮮筍紅燒。

description.en: Lamb belly braised in spicy bean paste, served in a clay pot.
description.zh: 羊腩辣豆瓣慢煲，連煲上桌。

description.en: Free-range chicken stewed with mixed mushrooms and glass noodles.
description.zh: 土雞、雜菇與粉條同燉，湯鮮味濃。

description.en: Glass noodles stir-fried with minced pork in a spicy bean sauce.
description.zh: 粉絲與肉末辣醬同炒。

description.en: Shredded pork and green peppers wok-fried in light soy.
description.zh: 肉絲與青椒清炒，醬油調味。

description.en: Pork, wood ear mushroom and bamboo shoots in a spicy garlic-vinegar sauce.
description.zh: 肉絲、木耳、筍絲魚香炒，酸辣開胃。

description.en: Green beans dry-fried with minced pork and garlic.
description.zh: 四季豆與肉末蒜香煸炒。

description.en: Crispy fried chicken tossed with dried chilies and Sichuan peppercorn.
description.zh: 雞塊炸至金脆，乾辣椒、花椒爆香。

description.en: Celery and smoked tofu wok-fried with a touch of chili.
description.zh: 芹菜與豆乾清炒，微辣爽口。

description.en: Soft-scrambled eggs wok-fried with yellow chives.
description.zh: 雞蛋與韭黃旺火同炒，清香鮮嫩。

description.en: Fresh tomatoes and eggs stir-fried together, sweet-tangy.
description.zh: 番茄與雞蛋旺火同炒，鹹甜入味。

description.en: Prawns folded into lightly seasoned soft-scrambled eggs.
description.zh: 蝦仁滑蛋同炒，清淡鮮甜。

description.en: Tiger prawns flash-fried in searing oil until crisp and juicy.
description.zh: 大蝦旺火油爆，外脆內嫩。

description.en: Pork ribs or beef coated in spiced rice flour and steamed until tender.
description.zh: 排骨或牛肉裹五香米粉蒸熟，粉糯入味。

description.en: Smooth steamed egg custard with dried shrimp.
description.zh: 蛋液加蝦皮蒸至嫩滑，清淡鮮香。

description.en: Minced pork and soft egg steamed together in a light broth.
description.zh: 肉末與溏心蛋同蒸，鮮嫩入味。

dishName.en: Steamed Ash Gourd with Dried Scallops

description.en: Winter melon steamed with dried scallops in a light broth.
description.zh: 冬瓜配瑤柱清蒸，湯汁清甜。

description.en: Soft tofu topped with seasoned minced pork and steamed.
description.zh: 豆腐鋪肉末上鍋蒸，鹹鮮嫩滑。

description.en: Chicken pieces steamed with shiitake mushrooms in a light marinade.
description.zh: 雞件與香菇同蒸，香氣濃郁，肉質嫩滑。

description.en: Enoki mushrooms steamed with glass noodles and doused in hot garlic oil.
description.zh: 金針菇配粉絲同蒸，澆蒜蓉熱油激香。

description.en: Steamed eggplant dressed with house chili oil and garlic.
description.zh: 茄子蒸熟，自家辣油蒜蓉拌勻。

description.en: Free-range chicken simmered with red dates into a nourishing broth.
description.zh: 走地老雞與紅棗慢燉，湯色金黃。

description.en: Lamb leg simmered with spices in a milky white broth.
description.zh: 羊腿肉與香料慢燉，湯色乳白。

description.en: Fresh fish and tofu simmered with millet into a clean, sweet broth.
description.zh: 鮮魚配豆腐、小米同燉，湯底清甜。

description.en: Pork meatballs and seasonal vegetables in a clear broth.
description.zh: 豬肉丸與時蔬清湯，清淡鮮甜。

description.en: Oxtail braised with spices in a rich, clear broth.
description.zh: 牛尾與香料清燉，湯汁醇厚。

dishName.en: Lotus Root and Pork Bone Soup

description.en: Lotus root and pork bones simmered into a milky, earthy broth.
description.zh: 蓮藕與筒骨慢燉，湯色奶白。

description.en: Tomato, seaweed and egg drop soup with dried shrimp.
description.zh: 番茄、紫菜、蝦皮滾湯，打蛋花。

description.en: Pan-fried omelette simmered with watercress in a light broth.
description.zh: 煎蛋與潺菜同煮清湯，清淡爽口。

description.en: Kimchi, tofu and bean sprouts in a tangy, spicy broth.
description.zh: 泡菜、豆腐、豆芽辣湯，酸辣開胃。

description.en: Shredded daikon and cabbage in rice vinegar and chili oil.
description.zh: 蘿蔔絲與包菜，米醋辣油輕拌。

description.en: Pork slices poached in chili-bean broth, finished with hot oil.
description.zh: 肉片豆瓣熬汁，潑熱油激香，麻辣燙口。

description.en: Spare ribs packed with fried garlic and steamed until tender.
description.zh: 排骨鋪蒜蓉清蒸，蒜香撲鼻。

description.en: Luffa steamed over glass noodles with garlic and dried shrimp.
description.zh: 絲瓜鋪於粉絲上，蒜頭蝦米同蒸。

description.en: Marinated chicken or fish cooked tableside in a sizzling clay pot.
description.zh: 雞或魚醃製後入陶煲猛火啫啫，連煲上桌。

dishName.en: Five-Finger Peach Root Chicken Clay Pot

description.en: Free-range chicken braised with five-finger peach root, faintly sweet with coconut aroma.
description.zh: 走地雞與五指毛桃同煲，廣式滋補，淡椰香清甜。

description.en: Beef, tomato, cabbage and root vegetables simmered into a rich stew.
description.zh: 牛肉、番茄、椰菜與根莖菜慢燉，濃而不膩。

description.en: Pork ribs and green peppers simmered into a clear, lightly peppery broth.
description.zh: 排骨與青椒清燉，湯色澄淨微辛。

description.en: Free-range chicken simmered with shiitake, oyster and tea-tree mushrooms.
description.zh: 走地雞配香菇、平菇、茶樹菇慢燉，湯鮮味濃。

description.en: Sweet luffa and house-made fish tofu in a clear broth.
description.zh: 絲瓜與自製魚腐清湯滾煮，清甜鮮嫩。

description.en: Salmon collar and tofu in a light white miso broth.
description.zh: 三文魚頸與豆腐，白味噌清湯，鮮而不腥。

description.en: Rice noodles in coconut-spice broth with prawns, tofu puffs and laksa leaf.
description.zh: 米麵浸椰香辣湯，配蝦、豆卜、叻沙葉。

description.en: Clay-pot rice cooked with taro, dried shrimp and a touch of lard.
description.zh: 煲仔飯配芋頭、蝦米，淋豬油提香。

description.en: Clay-pot rice folded with spring vegetables, bamboo shoot and salted pork.
description.zh: 春蔬、嫩筍與鹹豬肉拌入煲仔飯，春季限定。

description.en: Day-old rice wok-tossed with egg, scallion and a touch of lard.
description.zh: 隔夜飯與蛋液旺火同炒，蔥花、豬油提香。

description.en: Wok-fried rice with minced pork, chili and fresh Thai basil.
description.zh: 豬肉末、辣椒與九層塔旺火炒飯。

description.en: Velveted pork in tomato broth thickened to a smooth finish.
description.zh: 肉片上漿，番茄湯打芡成羹，酸甜鮮嫩。

description.en: Tofu pudding topped with pork ragù, peanuts and pickled mustard.
description.zh: 嫩豆花澆肉臊，配花生、芽菜，川味鹹辣。

description.en: Pork strips seasoned with Sichuan pepper, coated in sweet-potato starch and fried golden.
description.zh: 豬肉條花椒醃製，紅薯粉漿炸至金黃酥脆。

description.en: Whole sea bass braised in chili-bean sauce until the glaze clings.
description.zh: 整條鱸魚豆瓣醬乾燒收汁。

description.en: Shell-on prawns fried and tossed with Sichuan pepper-salt, garlic and chili.
description.zh: 帶殼大蝦旺火炸香，椒鹽、蒜蓉、辣椒拌勻。

description.en: Yunnan porcini dry-fried with garlic and dried chili until edges char.
description.zh: 雲南牛肝菌猛火乾爆，蒜片辣椒提香，邊緣微焦。

description.en: Cauliflower dry-fried with cured pork belly, garlic and dried chili.
description.zh: 花菜與臘肉、乾辣椒乾鍋慢煸，香辣入味。

description.en: Potato florets fried crisp and glazed with sweet-and-sour sauce.
description.zh: 土豆切花炸酥，糖醋芡汁裹勻。

description.en: Lamb shoulder wok-seared with cumin, dried chili and scallion.
description.zh: 羊肩肉旺火爆炒，孜然、辣椒、蔥段提香。

description.en: Sea bass in a tangy, spicy broth with Sichuan pickled mustard greens.
description.zh: 鱸魚片上漿，老酸菜酸辛湯底同煮，開胃爽口。

description.en: Hand-pulled noodles in a braised soy-spice beef broth with tendon and brisket.
description.zh: 手拉麵浸紅燒牛肉湯，牛腱牛筋配料豐富。

description.en: Eggplant braised with minced pork, garlic and chili-bean sauce.
description.zh: 茄子與肉末、豆瓣醬同煲，蒜香微辣。

description.en: Crisp vegetables tossed with fermented chili, peanuts and zhe'ergen.
description.zh: 時蔬涼拌，配糟辣椒、花生、折耳根，貴州風味。

description.en: Rice cooked with bok choy and cured pork, finished with lard.
description.zh: 青菜與臘肉同煮成飯，豬油提香，客家家常風味。

dishName.en: Malaysian Curry Chicken Cutlet Over Rice

description.en: Crispy chicken cutlet over rice with spicy coconut Malaysian curry.
description.zh: 炸雞排配白飯，澆椰香馬來咖喱。

dishName.en: Japanese Curry Chicken Katsu Rice Bowl

description.en: Panko-crusted chicken katsu over rice with Japanese curry.
description.zh: 麵包糠炸雞排蓋飯，日式咖喱醬汁澆勻。

description.en: Chicken and onion simmered in dashi-soy, finished with soft egg over rice.
description.zh: 雞肉與洋蔥柴魚醬油煮製，覆嫩蛋蓋飯。

dishName.en: Charred Pepper Beef & Tofu Pudding Pot

description.en: Sliced beef and tofu pudding in a smoky charred-chili broth, served bubbling.
description.zh: 滑牛肉片與嫩豆花，烧椒煙香湯底同煲。

description.en: A cold platter of braised pork, chicken and tofu seasoned with soy, star anise and five-spice.
description.zh: 精選滷豬、雞、豆乾冷切，醬香五香入味。

description.en: Lamb simmered in a clear, aromatic broth — a Shaanxi classic, best eaten with flatbread.
description.zh: 羊肉清燉，湯色澄淨，陝西水盆風味，配饦饦饃同食。

description.en: Pork trotters braised until meltingly tender in a milky, collagen-rich broth.
description.zh: 豬蹄慢燉至軟爛，湯色奶白，膠質豐盈。

description.en: Free-range chicken simmered with fish maw in a clear tonic broth.
description.zh: 走地雞與花膠同燉，湯色清澈，滋補養顏。
